description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage and four jobs: .spec, spec2.1, spec2.3, and spec2.4. The .spec job runs the default image and executes `bundle install --binstubs --path vendor --without production --jobs $(nproc) > /dev/null`, then `bin/rspec`, then `gem build total_recall.gemspec`. The spec2.1 job uses the ruby:2.1 Docker image and runs the same three commands, the spec2.3 job uses ruby:2.3, and the spec2.4 job uses ruby:2.4, all with the same script. All jobs are tagged with `docker`, belong to the test stage, and have no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules defined.
